text: I feel a sense of curiosity tinged with introspection. The transparent glass walls and the busy yet calm energy of the people inside the meeting room invite me to reflect on the nature of collaboration and knowledge sharing. Moving to the second space, with its bold R+D graphics and texts, I sense the importance of research and creation. I am both observer and participant in an environment brimming with ideas, open to the unfolding of new thoughts. The vibrant colors and thematic displays evoke excitement and inspire me to consider the relationship between creativity, innovation, and human connection.
